title: Generate Synthetic Test Data for Demos and Training
summary: Create training datasets with the synthetic generator, then walk through full Datilio workflows.

content.summary: Create training datasets with the synthetic generator, then walk through full Datilio workflows.

body.text: Training on production data risks leaks. Synthetic files let teams practice upload-through-export safely. Mirror production column names and types without real values. Generate thousands of rows with realistic distributions.

body.alt: Charts and graphs for business reporting
body.caption: Charts and graphs for business reporting. Photo: Unsplash

body.text: Mirror production column names and types without real values. Generate thousands of rows with realistic distributions.
Upload synthetic CSV through preview, build charts, save rules, and run Talk to Data exercises on fake but structurally real data.

items: Label synthetic files clearly in filenames.
Include intentional quality issues for teaching detection.
Reset exercises monthly with fresh generated data.

body.text: Practice end-to-end: upload, missing-value check, filter, chart, verify AI, export. Time each step for onboarding benchmarks.
Graduate learners to sanitized production subsets under supervision.
Synthetic test data makes Datilio onboarding scalable without compliance nightmares.

meta_description: Create training datasets with the synthetic generator, then walk through full Datilio workflows.
